# selectedCalendars

**Instance Property**

The calendars selected by the user.

## Declaration

```swift
var selectedCalendars: Set<EKCalendar> { get set }
```

## Selecting a Calendar Type

- **selectionStyle**: Determines whether to allow selection of multiple calendars.
- **EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle**: Indicates whether users may select a single calendar, or multiple calendars.
- **EKCalendarChooserDisplayStyle**: Indicates whether to display all calendars or writable calendars only.
